title: Post-Acquisition Non-Compete
description: Restricted covenant signed by departing founders preventing them from competing with the acquired startup entity.
whatsCovered: Exceptions for minor passive public stock investments
whenToUse: Use this non-compete contract to ensure that selling founders do not launch a similar product right after receiving their buyout check.

fields.label: Company Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 100 Innovators Blvd, San Francisco, CA

clauses.heading: POST-ACQUISITION NON-COMPETE
clauses.body: This startup agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {company_name}, located at {company_address} (the "Company"), and the counterparty or stakeholders executing this document below.

clauses.heading: 1. Core Agreement Terms
clauses.body: This agreement sets out the transaction and operational terms for Post-Acquisition Non-Compete. The parties agree to coordinate in good faith to complete milestones, share resources, or grant rights as specified.

clauses.heading: 2. Restricted Competition
clauses.body: Founder {founder_name} agrees not to engage in competing business with {buyer_name} for a period of {noncompete_years} years within {geographic_scope}.

clauses.heading: 3. Proprietary Information and Secrecy
clauses.body: Both parties agree to treat all financial metrics, corporate plans, cap tables, and research files received during the execution of this Agreement as confidential and proprietary.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Are post-acquisition non-competes easier to enforce?
faq.answer: Yes. While employment non-competes are heavily restricted in places like California, non-competes signed in connection with the SALE of a business are highly enforceable.

faq.question: Can founders work as consultants in the same industry?
faq.answer: Generally no, unless explicitly carved out as an exception in this agreement.
